sentences.target: Ich habe heute keine Energie mehr.

translations.de: Ich habe heute keine Energie mehr.
translations.en: I have no energy left today.
translations.es: Hoy ya no me queda energía.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天一点精力都没有。
translations.ru: Сегодня у меня совсем нет сил.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi không còn chút năng lượng nào.
translations.nl: Vandaag heb ik geen energie meer.
translations.uk: Сьогодні в мене зовсім немає сил.
translations.hi: आज बिल्कुल ताकत नहीं बची है.
translations.el: Σήμερα δεν μου έχει μείνει καθόλου ενέργεια.
translations.nb: I dag har jeg ikke mer energi.
translations.sv: I dag har jag ingen energi kvar.
translations.da: I dag har jeg ikke mere energi.
translations.fi: Tänään minulla ei ole enää energiaa.
translations.ja: 今日はもう体力がない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with subject 'Ich'; expresses possession.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time frame 'today'.
Negative determiner; feminine singular accusative, modifying 'Energie'; negates the noun phrase.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; head of the object NP governed by 'habe'.
Polarity-sensitive adverb meaning 'anymore/no longer' in the scope of negation; signals cessation.

sentences.target: Der Kaffee gibt mir endlich Energie.

translations.de: Der Kaffee gibt mir endlich Energie.
translations.en: The coffee finally gives me energy.
translations.es: El café por fin me da energía.
translations.fr: Le café me donne enfin de l'énergie.
translations.it: Finalmente il caffè mi dà energia.
translations.zh-Hans: 咖啡终于让我有精神了。
translations.pt: O café finalmente me dá energia.
translations.he: הקפה סוף סוף נותן לי כוח.
translations.vi: Cà phê cuối cùng cũng cho tôi năng lượng.
translations.hi: कॉफी आखिरकार मुझे ऊर्जा देती है.
translations.el: Ο καφές επιτέλους μου δίνει ενέργεια.
translations.ro: Cafeaua îmi dă în sfârșit energie.
translations.ja: コーヒーがようやく元気をくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Kaffee'.
Common noun; masculine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; ditransitive, selecting a dative recipient ('mir') and an accusative theme ('Energie').
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of 'gibt'.
Sentence/VP-level adverb; conveys relief or culmination; modifies the predicate.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; direct object (theme) of 'gibt'.

sentences.target: Sie tankt neue Energie beim Spaziergang.

translations.de: Sie tankt neue Energie beim Spaziergang.
translations.en: She recharges her energy on a walk.
translations.es: Ella recarga energías dando un paseo.
translations.fr: Elle reprend de l'énergie en se promenant.
translations.ru: Она восстанавливает силы во время прогулки.
translations.pt: Ela recarrega as energias fazendo uma caminhada.
translations.vi: Cô ấy nạp lại năng lượng khi đi bộ.
translations.ar: هي تعيد שحن طاقتها أثناء المشي.
translations.nl: Ze laadt haar energie op tijdens een wandeling.
translations.uk: Вона відновлює сили під час прогулянки.
translations.hi: वह टहलने से अपनी ऊर्जा फिर से भर लेती है.
translations.el: Με έναν περίπατο γεμίζει ξανά ενέργεια.
translations.nb: Hun får ny energi på en tur.
translations.id: Dia mengisi ulang energinya saat berjalan.
translations.sv: Hon fyller på med energi under en promenad.
translations.ro: Își reîncarcă energia la o plimbare.
translations.da: Hun får ny energi på en gåtur.
translations.ja: 彼女は散歩で元気を取り戻す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative; form is ambiguous (she/they/You-formal); here used as the subject, likely 3rd person singular feminine.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'Energie' as accusative object.
Attributive adjective; feminine singular accusative (strong inflection) modifying 'Energie'.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'tankt'.
Preposition; contraction of 'bei dem'; governs dative; introduces the PP 'beim Spaziergang' (during/at the walk).
Common noun; masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'bei'.

sentences.target: Nach dem Sport fehlt mir die Energie.
sentences.reading: /naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt feːlt miːɐ̯ diː enɛʁˈgiː/

translations.de: Nach dem Sport fehlt mir die Energie.
translations.ipa: /naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt feːlt miːɐ̯ diː enɛʁˈgiː/
translations.en: After the workout, I lack the energy.
translations.es: Después de entrenar, me falta energía.
translations.fr: Après l'entraînement, je n'ai plus d'énergie.
translations.ru: После тренировки у меня нет сил.
translations.pt: Depois do treino, não tenho energia.
translations.vi: Sau buổi tập, tôi không còn năng lượng.
translations.ar: بعد التمرين لا تبقى لدي طاقة.
translations.nl: Na de training heb ik geen energie meer.
translations.uk: Після тренування в мене немає сил.
translations.hi: कसरत के बाद मेरी ताकत नहीं बचती.
translations.pl: Po treningu nie mam już energii.
translations.el: Μετά την προπόνηση δεν μου μένει ενέργεια.
translations.nb: Etter trening har jeg ikke mer energi.
translations.sv: Efter passet har jag ingen energi kvar.
translations.ro: După antrenament nu mai am energie.
translations.da: Efter træningen har jeg ikke mere energi.
translations.fi: Treenin jälkeen minulla ei ole enää energiaa.
translations.ja: トレーニングの後はもう体力がない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative; temporal meaning 'after'.
Definite article; dative masculine/neuter singular; determiner of 'Sport'.
Common noun; masculine singular dative; object of 'nach'.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive; expresses lack with nominative subject ('die Energie') and dative experiencer ('mir').
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; experiencer/complement of 'fehlt'.
Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Energie'.
Common noun; feminine singular nominative; grammatical subject of 'fehlt'.

Sie tankt neue Energie beim Spaziergang.
Nach dem Sport fehlt mir die Energie.
fu: /naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt feːlt miːɐ̯ diː enɛʁˈgiː/

The coffee finally gives me energy.
She recharges her energy on a walk.
After the workout, I lack the energy.
